description_long: This is an open hardcover book with olive green pages and a visible gray ribbon bookmark running down the center. The book's cover appears to be dark, possibly black or deep brown, and the edges of the pages are slightly uneven, giving it a well-used appearance. The pages are thick and matte, with no visible text or illustrations on the open spread. The ribbon bookmark is neatly placed, extending slightly beyond the bottom edge of the book. The book is of medium size, suitable for reading or note-taking, and would commonly be found in urban environments such as parks, cafes, or public benches. The overall design is simple and functional, with no decorative elements or embellishments on the cover or spine.
description: An open hardcover book with olive green pages and a gray ribbon bookmark, featuring a plain, dark cover and no visible illustrations or text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open pages, central gray ribbon bookmark, and the book's slightly curved page edges.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the book and the layered appearance of the pages, with the ribbon bookmark visible at the center.
description_view_2: Rear view of the open book, displaying the full spread of olive green pages and the central ribbon, with the back cover visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the book's thickness and the ribbon bookmark, with the back cover more prominent.
